title: Max Spending Per Party
description: Write a query to find the maximum Campaign_Spending for each party in book2. Return Party_Name and the max spending aliased as Max_Spending. Group by Party_Name.

schema: CREATE TABLE book2 (sno INTEGER, Party_Name TEXT, Contact_Name TEXT, Address TEXT, Campaign_Spending INTEGER)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT Party_Name, MAX(Campaign_Spending) AS Max_Spending FROM book2 GROUP BY Party_Name

schema: CREATE TABLE book2 (sno INTEGER, Party_Name TEXT, Contact_Name TEXT, Address TEXT, Campaign_Spending INTEGER)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT Party_Name, MAX(Campaign_Spending) AS Max_Spending FROM book2 GROUP BY Party_Name
